reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Very crowded during peak season.

reviews.comment:
El Aca de Santa Clara, siempre hay fila...hay que cargar antes del cambio de quincena

At the Aca de Santa Clara, there's always a line...you have to load before the fortnight change

reviews.comment:
Ultimamente me parece que en las estaciones del ACA parece que trabajan a reglamento por lo que tardan

(Translated by Google)
Lately it seems to me that the ACA stations are working strictly by the book, which is why they take so long.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtek1mNGJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Sábado 16 de enero los baños clausurado  nadie te decía por que nos mandaron al baño de la parrilla de atrás y  no avía agua lo que da bronca que no te informen

(Translated by Google)
Saturday, January 16, the bathrooms were closed. No one told you why they sent us to the bathroom in the back grill and there was no water. It's infuriating that they don't inform you.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtalAzNllnEAE

reviews.comment:
Buenos baños un lugar para hacer un alto y descansar. Muchos autos en relacion a la cantifad de surtidores lo q hace la carga de combustible muy lenta.

(Translated by Google)
Nice restrooms, a good place to stop and rest. There are too many cars relative to the number of pumps, making refueling very slow.
